title: Review Artifact Retention Cleanup
goal: Implement #440 by surfacing review artifact retention as actionable, advisory cleanup pressure.
non_goals: Do not delete review artifacts automatically.
Do not make review artifacts ordinary startup input.
Do not add a second review-tracking system.

intent.outcome: Report missing review-retention metadata and stale/superseded full-size review artifacts as selector-backed cleanup candidates.
intent.constraints: Keep historical reviews evidence-only and advisory.
intent.latitude: Reuse closeout_trust, operational_compression, and maintenance_pressure surfaces.
intent.escalation: Escalate if retention cleanup requires authoritative issue-tracker coupling or automatic deletion.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, close #440, then continue the footprint lane with #441.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surface checks, proof selector, root CLI authority audit, planning doctor, reconcile, and live report selectors passed.

invariants: Historical review artifacts are not promoted to authority.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #436 operational footprint pressure for long-running package artifacts

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #440 is closed, continue with #441 unless new higher-priority footprint friction appears

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Review-retention cleanup pressure becomes visible without manual directory scans.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Manual execplan authoring can omit projection-friendly fields; the plan was fixed immediately by adding context_budget before closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make package use smaller and cheaper while preserving leverage.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces, commit/push milestone, close the issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact compact field shape and candidate grouping.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Cleanup requires deleting user-owned review history.

context_budget.live working set: Issue #440, active execplan, closeout_trust selector, operational_compression selector, and focused workspace CLI tests.
context_budget.recoverable later: Archived execplan plus commit history after milestone closeout.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, closure_check, and closeout_distillation before archiving.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section operational_compression --format json
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Review-retention cleanup is advisory selector output, not artifact deletion.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: validation failure, scope pressure to delete artifacts, or new higher-priority dogfooding friction

immediate_next_action: Implement compact review-retention policy output and tests.
invariants: Retention pressure is advisory and selector-driven.
No automatic deletion or issue-tracker-specific policy is introduced.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/review-artifact-retention-cleanup.plan.json --format json
completion_criteria: Review retention metadata and cleanup candidates are visible in report/check output.
Reviews without retention shape are flagged or routed for update.
Stale or superseded full-size reviews receive advisory cleanup recommendations.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace summary --target . --format json; uv run agentic-workspace preflight --target . --format json
execution_run.what happened: Added selector-backed review-retention policy output to closeout_trust, mirrored the pressure in operational_compression, routed maintenance_pressure attention, and covered missing metadata plus cleanup recommendations in workspace CLI tests.
execution_run.scope touched: workspace report runtime, workspace CLI tests, and planning residue
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/review-artifact-retention-cleanup.plan.json --format json; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section operational_compression --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json
execution_run.next step: Archive plan, commit, push, close #440, refresh external evidence.

finished_run_review.intent served: yes; review artifacts now surface retention metadata gaps and cleanup recommendations without becoming startup input
finished_run_review.config compliance: used compact summary, report selectors, proof selection, workflow obligations, and package skill routing
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; no artifact deletion or authoritative review-tracker behavior was added

proof_report.validation proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surfaces, proof selector, root CLI authority audit, planning doctor, reconcile, and live selectors passed
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: 187 workspace CLI tests passed; ruff passed; planning surface health clean; proof selected workspace_cli, cli_authority, and planning_surfaces lanes; root CLI edit classified as derived-renderer/runtime report output.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: closeout_trust.historical_review_artifacts.retention_policy now reports missing retention metadata, retention-shape cleanup candidates, and resolved full-size review candidates; operational_compression and maintenance_pressure route the same pressure.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap activates a fresh bounded slice.

execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): none; the behavior is encoded in report output and regression tests

signals found: Manual execplan authoring initially omitted context_budget, making hierarchy projection less complete.
signals dismissed: No new issue; the package already surfaced the projection gap and the local plan was corrected immediately.

discard.summary: Transient command/test iteration details are not durable product knowledge.
